evidence.claim: Developed semantic search feature using sentence-transformers, FAISS, and query expansion
evidence.source_text: Developed a semantic search feature for an internal knowledge base of ~500K documents. Used sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2 initially, later upgraded to bge-base) with FAISS for fast nearest-neighbor retrieval. Designed the query expansion module

evidence.claim: Improved search-relevance by 35% over Elasticsearch BM25
evidence.source_text: Reported search-relevance improvement of 35% over the prior Elasticsearch BM25 setup, validated through human relevance judgments.

evidence.claim: Implemented RAG-based chatbot using OpenAI embeddings, Pinecone, and GPT-4
evidence.source_text: Implemented a RAG-based customer support chatbot... Built the document ingestion pipeline (chunking, embedding via OpenAI embeddings, storing in Pinecone) and the answer-generation layer (initially GPT-4, then a fine-tuned smaller model for cost control).

evidence.claim: Reduced average ticket resolution time by 31%
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: De-facto ML lead on a small team
evidence.source_text: Recently, I've been the de-facto ML lead on a small team, shipping models across NLP and recsys.

evidence.claim: Learned through shipping real systems and production load
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Certified in LangChain and Google Cloud Professional ML Engineering
evidence.source_text: LangChain for LLM Application Development (DeepLearning.AI, 2019); Google Cloud Professional ML Engineer (Google Cloud, 2022)

evidence.claim: Experienced in debugging production ranking issues
evidence.source_text: I've spent enough time debugging production ranking issues to know which signals matter and which are noise.

evidence.claim: Proficient in Reinforcement Learning, Computer Vision, FAISS, MLflow, LoRA, LangChain, Python, PEFT, Milvus, Deep Learning, and Recommendation Systems
evidence.source_text: Skills: Reinforcement Learning... Computer Vision... FAISS... MLflow... LoRA... LangChain... Python... PEFT... Milvus... Deep Learning... Recommendation Systems
